description: Identify major cities located near major rivers using gvSIG Desktop. Using the rivers data (/home/ga/gvsig_data/rivers/ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp) and cities data (/home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp), identify all cities located within 0.2 degrees of rivers that have a scalerank less than 4. Export the resulting selection as a new shapefile to /home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/river_cities.shp.
